description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/aws (Apache-2.0), entry S3_ACCESS_LOG. Inlined %{HTTPDATE}, %{IP}, %{NUMBER}, %{NOTSPACE}, %{QS} macros to plain PCRE2; trailing fields after `agent` were added by AWS in 2019-2022 and are optional here.
